output: Northfield Plastics LLC seeks a $12.5M revolver. Coverage is adequate (DSCR 1.42x). Key risk: customer concentration, top customer 38% of revenue.
Harbor Logistics Inc. requests an $8.0M term loan to expand its fleet, secured by rolling stock (78% LTV). Covenant: minimum fixed charge coverage 1.20x.
Caldwell Dental Group seeks a $3.2M acquisition loan; the seller finances 15%. The guarantor reports a $4.1M net worth.
Mesa Verde Hospitality requests a $22M construction loan for a 120-key hotel with a sponsor completion guaranty. Risk: market RevPAR fell 6% year over year.
Pinnacle Ag Supply seeks a $5.5M seasonal line governed by a borrowing base (80% of eligible AR, 50% of inventory). Peak utilization last year was 92%.
Brightline Medical Devices requests $9.75M in equipment financing on an 84-month amortization. Risk: the supported product line awaits FDA 510(k) clearance.
Two Rivers Brewing seeks a $1.8M expansion loan. DSCR of 1.15x sits below the 1.25x policy minimum, mitigated by a 25% cash collateral pledge.
Quarry Ridge Storage requests a $14.3M refinance of stabilized self-storage (91% occupancy, 9.8% debt yield). Note: the 30-year amortization is an exception to the 25-year policy standard.
Cedar Point Manufacturing seeks a $6.4M equipment line. Three-year average EBITDA is $2.1M. Risk: single-plant operation with no redundancy.
Lakeshore Senior Living requests $18.6M to acquire a 90-unit assisted-living facility (88% stabilized occupancy). Regulatory risk: state licensure transfer is pending.
Granite State Tooling seeks a $4.9M working-capital revolver advancing 85% of eligible receivables. Risk: top-three customer concentration at 54%.
Sunbelt Cold Storage requests a $27M construction-to-perm loan for a refrigerated warehouse. Pre-leasing is 65%; the sponsor co-invests 20% equity.
Ironwood Recycling seeks a $3.6M term loan for a baler upgrade. DSCR is 1.31x; note commodity-price exposure on baled cardboard.
Coastal Marine Services requests a $7.2M vessel refinance secured by two offshore supply vessels (70% LTV). Risk: charter contracts expire within 18 months.
Heartland Grain Co-op seeks an $11.4M seasonal grain-storage line; members' equity supports 30%. Note basis risk on stored bushels.
Vantage Data Centers requests a $42M mezzanine tranche behind a $160M senior facility. Risks: single-hyperscaler tenant concentration and subordination to the senior lenders.
